headline: Fortinet (FTNT) Gains More than 70% in May, Here’s What Took the Stock Higher
summary: Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) has gained more than 70% during the last month. Most of the gains came after the company posted strong results during fiscal Q1 2026 earnings, which were released on May 6. The stock is also among our Best Performing Stocks in May. ​During the quarter, Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) posted $1.85 billion in […]

headline: Fortinet Inc (NASDAQ:FTNT) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Investing Screen
summary: Quality investing highlights Fortinet (FTNT) with 11.5% revenue CAGR, 113.6% ROIC, and strong debt management, making it a top cybersecurity candidate.
